title: zanthoxylum rhodoxylon subsp. cubense
intro: Zanthoxylum rhodoxylon subsp. cubense is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, also known as the citrus or rue family, which is native to Cuba. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum rhodoxylon subsp. cubense include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of various digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
